title: litsea fluminensis
intro: Litsea fluminensis, also known as Brazilian litsea, is a species of evergreen tree or shrub that belongs to the family Lauraceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oil, which contains compounds such as limonene and beta-pinene. The health benefits of Litsea fluminensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and infections. Litsea fluminensis can be prepared as herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
